=====[[Trade]]d to the player===== After obtaining Brock's [[Pokégear]] phone number, players can meet him on [[Days of the week|Saturdays]] between 5 PM and 8 PM in [[Diglett's Cave]], where he will offer to trade a {{p|Rhyhorn}} with the [[Egg Move]] {{m|Thunder Fang}} in exchange for a {{p|Bonsly}}. {{Gen4ievent |pokemon=Rhyhorn |nick=Hornlette |ndex=0111 |gender=f |ball=Poké |type=Ground|type2=Rock |ot={{color|0070f8|Brock}} |id=06845 |nature=Relaxed |item=Passho Berry |met=a link trade
